commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9475b63859305ef643ac20f019fa6cf14223b082)
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens the session model-registry TypeBox `input` schema to accept `audio` and `video`, and adds a generated plugin catalog regression test.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +38. Total +47 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source, generated plugin catalog shards go through `loadCustomModels` and `validateModelsConfig`; current main rejects `audio`/`video` because that TypeBox schema only allows `text`/`image`, while adjacent config/catalog surfaces preserve those modalities.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the contributor must add real behavior proof, and the branch needs a small model input contract alignment before merge.

target.title: [codex] fix(agents): accept media input catalog modalities
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Closes #97048.

Generated plugin model catalog shards can contain `audio` or `video` input modalities from provider-owned catalog refreshes. The session model registry still validated those shards with a narrower `text`/`image` TypeBox schema, so otherwise valid generated catalogs were rejected and their models were dropped before selection.

## Why This Change Was Made

This aligns the model registry schema with the existing config/catalog contract that already accepts `audio` and `video` model input modalities. A focused regression covers a generated MiniMax plugin catalog shard with `["text", "image", "video", "audio"]` and verifies the model loads instead of being discarded.

## User Impact

Affected provider catalog refreshes no longer cause MiniMax/NVIDIA-style multimodal models to disappear from the registry solely because the generated input list includes `audio` or `video`.

AI-assisted: Codex prepared this draft PR.

## Evidence

- Pass: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sessions/model-registry.test.ts`
- Pass: `git diff --check`
- Partial adjacent proof: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/zod-schema.models.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts`
  - `src/config/zod-schema.models.test.ts` passed.
  - `src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts` failed two pre-existing native-streaming usage compat assertions in an untouched file (`detects native streaming usage compat from the endpoint capabilities`, `opts models into streaming usage for native endpoints while preserving explicit overrides`).
- Autoreview gap: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` was not run because the execution policy rejected sending the local diff/code to an external model-review engine. No workaround was attempted.

No agent transcript section is included because the repo workflow requires explicit user approval before attaching sanitized local session logs.
target.author: harjothkhara
